createNew.label: Create new config
createNew.description: Start a new project with a blank structure

edit.label: Edit page
edit.description: Switch to edit mode to customize this page

endEdit.label: Exit edition
endEdit.description: Save changes and return to player mode

cancelEdit.label: Cancel changes
cancelEdit.description: Discard changes and return to player mode

clear.label: Reset grid
clear.description: Clear all current content and start over

unlock.label: Unlock grid
unlock.description: Unlock the grid to be able to edit this content

addBefore.label: Add left
addBefore.description: Insert a new column to the left

addAfter.label: Add right
addAfter.description: Insert a new column to the right

delete.label: Delete
delete.description: Delete this box from the grid
